abort.single_instance_allowed: Device Sentinel is already configured. Only a single instance is supported.

data_description.low_threshold: A battery at or below this level is flagged low. It clears once it climbs 2 points above the threshold.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: These settings are stored now and used once detection notifications are built. Nothing is sent yet.

data_description.high_priority_targets: Notify targets that receive high-priority pushes. High priority bypasses Do Not Disturb and pierces quiet hours. Leave empty for none.
data_description.normal_priority_targets: Notify targets that receive normal pushes. Standard delivery, held during quiet hours. A target in both lists is treated as high. Leave empty for none.
data_description.persistent_enabled: Also maintain a persistent notification in the UI, replaced in place so it never stacks.
data_description.quiet_hours_enabled: When on, normal-priority pushes are held during the window below; high-priority targets still fire, and the lists and state keep updating.
data_description.quiet_hours_start: When the quiet window begins. A start later than the end crosses midnight.
data_description.quiet_hours_end: When the quiet window ends. Nothing fires at this time; it only defines the window.
data_description.daily_reminder_mode: None: notify only on new items. Overnight changes: only if something appeared during quiet hours. Daily summary: every day, with an all-clear when nothing is flagged.
data_description.daily_reminder_time: When the daily send is owed. The time is only a wake-up; a send missed during a reboot is caught up on the next run.

exclusions.title: Exclusions
exclusions.description: Excluded items keep learning and never appear in detections or lists. Undo any time; nothing is lost. An excluded entity still vouches for its device.

data_description.excluded_entities: These entities are never reported themselves, but still count as activity for their device.
data_description.excluded_devices: These devices are never judged or listed.
data_description.excluded_labels: Devices and entities carrying these labels are excluded.
data_description.excluded_areas: Devices and entities in these areas are excluded.
data_description.excluded_integrations: Devices owned by these integrations are excluded. Hardware an integration merely sees (a router tracking a camera) is not caught.

options.overnight: Overnight changes (only if something was added during quiet hours)
options.daily: Daily summary (every day, all-clear when nothing is flagged)
